text:
Once upon a quiet town. There was an owl who learned things quietly. Every star made him think. A curious thought. He wondered how cats dream.

One autumn night. He fluttered downstairs. Saw the moon light cats' claws.

They wouldn't eat fish. Fancy some mice. So he'd fly about. One day. Offer.

They heard. They hissed. Cats.

But no.

One day.

One mouse.

He flew back home. Hung upside-down.

They ate. Laughed. Said owl ate nothing. They ignored him. Until...

He waited. Waited. Waited.

They wanted eggs.

So he slept.

Until tomorrow morning.

Oh.

Maybe cheese?

They liked cheese.

He got cheese. They loved.

Talk owl-talk. Owls sleep.

Happy owl.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
